bio: C.J. Brion is a Los Angeles-based cinematographer and photographer with 16 years of freelance experience in single- and multi-camera production, available worldwide.

He moves fast, keeps post happy, and thrives in complex setups — ARRI, Sony, and RED fluent, equally at home on live broadcasts, mixed-format shoots, and high-volume delivery. International shoots are second nature: ATA Carnet, customs clearance, and travel crew logistics, all handled.
When he’s not behind the lens, you’ll find him mountain biking, climbing, or fly-fishing somewhere in the mountains.
